research_topic: Research B - missed signals, diagnostic errors, and late discovery cases
definition: A plausible first label stops diagnostic search.

research_topic: Research B - missed signals, diagnostic errors, and late discovery cases
common_signal: Prior normal colonoscopy; normal resting ECG; limited MRI; noncontrast CT

research_topic: Research B - missed signals, diagnostic errors, and late discovery cases
definition: Symptoms/labs/visits across time and specialties remain separate.

research_topic: Research B - missed signals, diagnostic errors, and late discovery cases
definition: Patient is routed to specialty that sees only one symptom domain.
common_signal: GI vs gynecology; psychiatry vs cardiology; eating-disorder clinic vs GI

research_topic: Research B - missed signals, diagnostic errors, and late discovery cases
definition: A finalized abnormal test/result does not trigger patient care action.

research_topic: Research B - missed signals, diagnostic errors, and late discovery cases
definition: Critical information fails at EMS/ED, discharge, coverage, or team transition.

research_topic: Research B - missed signals, diagnostic errors, and late discovery cases
tag: doctor did not listen / symptom dismissed

research_topic: Research B - missed signals, diagnostic errors, and late discovery cases
definition: Symptoms attributed to anxiety/stress before physical conditions are addressed.

research_topic: Research B - missed signals, diagnostic errors, and late discovery cases

research_topic: Research B - missed signals, diagnostic errors, and late discovery cases
definition: Clinic lacks test supplies/equipment needed to confirm disease.

research_topic: Research B - missed signals, diagnostic errors, and late discovery cases
definition: Return visits do not trigger escalation or diagnostic reset.

definition: Unfamiliar conditions hide under common symptoms.
